explanation.explanation: Quick Sort averages O(n log n) but can degrade to O(n²) with bad pivots. In-place and cache-efficient. Best for general-purpose sorting of random data.
explanation.reasoning: ML Context: Small dataset (n=49) - Insertion Sort is optimal
explanation.tip: Quick Sort's performance depends on pivot selection - median-of-three helps avoid worst case.
